title: GPU-accelerated virtual drug screening with cuML and Agent Platform
summary: A Google Cloud livestream presentation showing how GPUs accelerate virtual drug screening using cuML and Agent Platform. The demo achieves 20x-45x training speedups on molecular prediction tasks by replacing CPU-bound pandas and scikit-learn workflows with GPU-accelerated cuDF and cuML equivalents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream demonstrates GPU-accelerated virtual drug screening built on cuML and Agent Platform. The demo replaces CPU-bound pandas and scikit-learn workflows with GPU-accelerated cuDF and cuML equivalents, reporting 20x-45x training speedups on molecular prediction tasks. The takeaway: drop-in GPU libraries can cut training time on tabular data science workloads without rewriting the modeling logic.
